# CraftChirp Creations - Eco-Luxury Handmade Mud Art

> Premium eco-friendly handcrafted mud art. Zero chemicals, odorless, and beautifully textured for the modern sanctuary.

CraftChirp Creations transforms traditional handmade mud art into a premium global design product. Rooted in Indian tradition and presented with modern aesthetics, our pieces are sustainable, safe, and artistic home décor.

## Key Information
- **Materials**: Pure cow dung, fine earth clays, and natural pigments.
- **Process**: Purification, handcrafted shaping, and natural eco-friendly sun curing.
- **Benefits**: Eco-friendly, biodegradable, 100% non-toxic, odorless, and highly textured.
- **Contact**: craftchirp@gmail.com
- **Instagram**: [@craftchirp_creations](https://www.instagram.com/craftchirp_creations/)
- **Website**: https://kushagr-tech.github.io/craftchirp/
